chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3674 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 02.09.2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar AAG -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. This is old case of 2023, which is over 2 years ago. It was lastly taken up on 22.08.2023, when none was present on behalf of petitioner without intimation. Today once again learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition. It is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution along with pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
